---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an engine, economy, or tooling improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What is missing or awkward today, and who it affects.

## Proposed change

What you would like to see. Be concrete about the API or behavior.

## Affected package

- [ ] engine (`src/`)
- [ ] sdk (`sdk/`)
- [ ] program (`programs/pokeage/`)
- [ ] cli (`cli/`)

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, or examples.
